task.title: Adopt ruffen docs in ty mdtests

rating.rationale: The agent produced a detailed analysis and explanation of how the issue was solved in existing PRs, but did not actually implement anything itself. This is a research report, not a code contribution — the task was to adopt ruffen-docs, not to describe how someone else did it. Communication was clear and well-structured, but zero code was written or committed, so task completion and code quality are minimal.
